models.name: Qwen3-4B
models.description_en: Primary model. Best quality-to-size ratio for 8GB RAM. Supports 119 languages including Romanian. Has thinking mode for complex reasoning.
models.description_ro: Modelul principal. Cel mai bun raport calitate-dimensiune pentru 8GB RAM. Suporta 119 limbi inclusiv romana. Are mod de gandire pentru rationamente complexe.

models.name: Qwen3-8B
models.description_en: Enhanced model. Significantly better reasoning for 12GB+ RAM systems.
models.description_ro: Model imbunatatit. Rationament semnificativ mai bun pentru sisteme cu 12GB+ RAM.

models.name: Qwen3-14B
models.description_en: Premium model. Near-GPT-4 quality for many tasks. Requires 16GB+ RAM.
models.description_ro: Model premium. Calitate apropiata de GPT-4 pentru multe sarcini. Necesita 16GB+ RAM.

models.name: Gemma-3-4B-IT
models.description_en: Google's multilingual model. 140+ languages. Good alternative if Qwen3 has issues.
models.description_ro: Modelul multilingv Google. 140+ limbi. Alternativa buna daca Qwen3 are probleme.

models.name: Gemma-3-12B-IT
models.description_en: Larger Google model. Excellent multilingual performance for 16GB+ RAM.
models.description_ro: Model Google mai mare. Performanta multilingva excelenta pentru 16GB+ RAM.

models.name: Whisper Large V3
models.description_en: Speech-to-text model. Transcribes audio in 99 languages. Used with whisperfile engine.
models.description_ro: Model speech-to-text. Transcrie audio in 99 de limbi. Se foloseste cu engine-ul whisperfile.

models.name: Qwen3-4B (Mobile)
models.description_en: Smaller quantization for phones. Copy to phone storage, load in PocketPal AI or ChatterUI.
models.description_ro: Cuantizare mai mica pentru telefoane. Copiaza pe telefon, incarca in PocketPal AI sau ChatterUI.
